'''鈭歡-f-sh''' ('''kagafash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiccough|hiccough]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiccough|hiccough]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-f-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kagafash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigafash|thigafash]] || [[word:jigafash|jigafash]] || [[word:shigafash|shigafash]] || [[word:kigafash|kigafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugafash|thuthugafash]] || [[word:jujugafash|jujugafash]] || [[word:shushugafash|shushugafash]] || [[word:kukugafash|kukugafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugafash|thugafash]] || [[word:jugafash|jugafash]] || [[word:shugafash|shugafash]] || [[word:kugafash|kugafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugafash|thugafash]] || [[word:jugafash|jugafash]] || [[word:shugafash|shugafash]] || [[word:kugafash|kugafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegafash|thegafash]] || [[word:jegafash|jegafash]] || [[word:shegafash|shegafash]] || [[word:kegafash|kegafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogafash|thothogafash]] || [[word:jojogafash|jojogafash]] || [[word:shoshogafash|shoshogafash]] || [[word:kokogafash|kokogafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogafash|thogafash]] || [[word:jogafash|jogafash]] || [[word:shogafash|shogafash]] || [[word:kogafash|kogafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogafash|thogafash]] || [[word:jogafash|jogafash]] || [[word:shogafash|shogafash]] || [[word:kogafash|kogafash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]] || [[word:gafash|gafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gafash|th忙gafash]] || [[word:j忙gafash|j忙gafash]] || [[word:sh忙gafash|sh忙gafash]] || [[word:k忙gafash|k忙gafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagafash|thathagafash]] || [[word:jajagafash|jajagafash]] || [[word:shashagafash|shashagafash]] || [[word:kakagafash|kakagafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagafash|thagafash]] || [[word:jagafash|jagafash]] || [[word:shagafash|shagafash]] || [[word:kagafash|kagafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagafash|thagafash]] || [[word:jagafash|jagafash]] || [[word:shagafash|shagafash]] || [[word:kagafash|kagafash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagafash|shagafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagafash|goshagafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagafash|gokishagafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagafashn眉|shagafashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagafashnkn眉|goshagafashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafashn眉|gokishagafashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagafashsh毛|shagafashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagafashnksh毛|goshagafashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagafashsh毛|gokishagafashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafashro|shagafashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafashnkro|goshagafashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafashro|gokishagafashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafashmu|shagafashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafashnkmu|goshagafashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafashmu|gokishagafashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagafashsher|shagafashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagafashnksher|goshagafashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagafashsher|gokishagafashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagafashng|shagafashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagafashnkng|goshagafashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagafashng|gokishagafashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagafashya|shagafashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagafashnkya|goshagafashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagafashya|gokishagafashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagafashyam|shagafashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagafashnkyam|goshagafashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagafashyam|gokishagafashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagafashn眉sh毛|shagafashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagafashnkn眉sh毛|goshagafashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagafashn眉sh毛|gokishagafashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafashn眉ro|shagafashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafashnkn眉ro|goshagafashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafashn眉ro|gokishagafashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafashn眉mu|shagafashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafashnkn眉mu|goshagafashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafashn眉mu|gokishagafashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagafashsh毛n眉|shagafashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagafashnksh毛n眉|goshagafashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafashsh毛n眉|gokishagafashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafashsh毛ro|shagafashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafashnksh毛ro|goshagafashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafashsh毛ro|gokishagafashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafashsh毛mu|shagafashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafashnksh毛mu|goshagafashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafashsh毛mu|gokishagafashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagafashron眉|shagafashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagafashnkron眉|goshagafashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafashron眉|gokishagafashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagafashrosh毛|shagafashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagafashnkrosh毛|goshagafashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagafashrosh毛|gokishagafashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagafashromu|shagafashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagafashnkromu|goshagafashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagafashromu|gokishagafashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagafashmun眉|shagafashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagafashnkmun眉|goshagafashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagafashmun眉|gokishagafashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagafashmush毛|shagafashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagafashnkmush毛|goshagafashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagafashmush毛|gokishagafashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagafashmuro|shagafashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagafashnkmuro|goshagafashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagafashmuro|gokishagafashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
